rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE SUZANNE CASTLE TRUST DATED APRIL 22, 2009
rulings.Calendar Matter: Verified Petition For Order To Set Aside Amendment Of Trust, And Invalidate Will Due To (1) Undue Influence, (2) Lack Of Testamentary Capacity, And (3) Elder Abuse; Remove Trustee; Compel Trustee To Provide All Trust Documents And Accounting; Impose Punitive Damages
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/12/25. (No earlier date available.) 1) The addresses of the persons whose addresses were previously unknown (Javier Rodriguez and Josephina Alaniz) have still not been set forth in a verified supplement such that the Court can determine that notice to them was correct. 2) The âsupplementâ filed on 10/14/24 amended the petition. No notice has been given of this erroneously captioned pleading. (Please review CRC 7.3 for the distinction between a supplement and an amendment and CRC 7.53 regarding notice for an amendment vs. a supplement.) 3) It does not appear that the new objectors gave notice of their objections filed on 12/2/24. No response has been filed yet by the petitioner. Deadline is 2/26/25 to provide courtesy copies to the assigned examiner of any new papers. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (Courtesy copies are file stamped, single-sided, hard copies. [LRSF 14.7 B. and C.])

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DONALD GEORGE STROH
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues to be address: 1. Petition #6 needs to affirm the first box regarding information by whom the decedent survived; however, the petition left #6 blank. The attorney filed a relevant declaration; however, the allegations are not verified by the petitioner. The Court will determine its sufficiency. 2. Petition seeks the funds be deposited into blocked account(s); however, the court may rather require bond. 3. Proposed order order must have a copy of lost will attached. Prob. Code sec. 8223. LRSF 14.7.A and 14.20. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE DORIS PHILLIPS LIVING TRUST U/T/A DATED JUNE 10, 2005 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition By Trustee Including Points & Authorities In Support Of Petition To Confirm Assets As Trust
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues to be cleared: (1) Proposed order to set forth full caption. "Order" appears insufficient. (2) The Court may inquire about Donald Phillip's capacity to waive notice. (3) Need allegation whether the beneficiary, Donald, has any child who may be the contingent beneficiary of the SNT. The contingent beneficiary (of the SNT) must be noticed pursuant to Peob. Code sec. 15804 as sec. 17203 instructs. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BENN EUGENE HIPP
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MILTON K. LEE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing to admit will. No appearance required. Status hearing on filing of petition for final distribution or petition for approval on report of status of administration will be set for 03/02/2026.
